Research Areas

  • Blockchain Systems and Smart Contracts
  • Federated Learning with Trust Mechanisms
  • Decentralized Finance (DeFi)
  • Zero-Knowledge Proof Systems

Current Work

  • XComb: Decentralized investor–entrepreneur platform
  • Federated Learning on Blockchain: Secure aggregation mechanisms

Research Vision

The objective is to design decentralized infrastructures enabling transparent, trustless, and scalable collaboration across domains.
